title: CommunityBoardApplication
description: An application from a Brooklyn resident to be appointed to a community board (or other body the Borough President appoints to) — the single most consequential constituent-facing action the office takes each year, and the natural counterpart to the read-only 'BP Appointments' and 'Community Board Contact List' datasets. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for the application intake; today it is collected only through a WordPress web form (Contact Form 7 / third-party form) with no machine-readable contract. This schema serves both the write surface (submit an application) and the read-back of an applicant's own submission.

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application reference. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by the office, not the applicant.

boardType.description: Which body the applicant is applying to serve on.

communityBoardPreference.description: Preferred Brooklyn community board number (1-18) where applicable.

isBrooklynResident.description: Applicant attests to living or working in Brooklyn.

statementOfInterest.description: Why the applicant wants to serve and relevant experience.

resumeUrl.description: Optional link to a résumé / CV.
